ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT(ISNEW()), NOW() > (CreatedDate + (1 / 2880)), RecordType.DeveloperName = "Vendor_Form", $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'SW Billing', $User.Id <> '0056700000CC7v7AAD',
$User.SYSFullID__c <> '0056700000AkJRjAAN', /*integrationsystems@similarweb.com*/ NOT(ISCHANGED(Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c)) )
